prompt: I have a custom PMD ruleset file at /home/oat/.config/opencode/skills/pmd-scan-workspace/iteration-1/eval-2-custom-ruleset/input/config/pmd-ruleset.xml and Java code at .../input/src. Run PMD using this custom ruleset via the docker.io/pmdcode/pmd:latest container image with podman. Mount the input directory to /src. Use the custom ruleset configuration. Generate a SARIF format report saved to /src/target/pmd-report.sarif. The custom ruleset focuses on error-prone and code style rules only.

assertions.text: Agent uses podman to run PMD (not local install)
Agent mounts the input directory to /src
Agent uses -R /src/config/pmd-ruleset.xml to reference custom ruleset
Agent generates SARIF format report (-f sarif)
SARIF report file is generated and non-empty
Violations related to error-prone and code-style rules are found
Agent detects that the legacy ruleset paths need updating for PMD 7.x
